projectDescription: A drop-in PyTorch module that replaces standard linear layers with a parameter-efficient, structure-preserving multi-dimensional transformation.
keyFeatures: Drop-in replacement for nn.Linear — no architecture changes required
Preserves multi-dimensional tensor structure natively without flattening
Up to 8x model size reduction with no accuracy loss
NdLinearGated extends NdLinear with soft/hard gating for adaptive information flow
Supports CNNs, Transformers, MLPs, RNNs, and Vision Transformers
Compatible with ONNX, TensorRT, SNPE, and other export formats
Works alongside pruning, quantization, and distillation
publicApiSurface: NdLinearGated(input_dims, hidden_size, transform_outer=True, gating_mode='soft', gating_hidden_dim=16, gated_modes='all')
